---
title: "Emiliano G. Herrer"
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-section}

![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-photo fig-alt="Profile photo"}

::: {}
## About me

I am a PhD candidate (currently finishing!) in **Fluid Mechanics** at [University of Sevilla](https://www.us.es/), working on computational fluid dynamics (CFD) with applications in fluid-solid interaction problems.

More specifically, my research focus on the numerical modelling of flows through collapsible channels, using different software as Matlab, Julia and C++ to perform different kind of simulations. Check my [code](code.qmd) section to take a look to some examples of what I do!

I am passionate about open-source scientific computing, reproducible research,  and making CFD tools accessible to the community.

**Interests:** CFD, Flud Mechanics, Elasticity, Scientific Computing

**Contact:** [emiherrer@gmail.com](mailto:emiherrer@gmail.com)
:::

<!--
:::

## Publications

::: {.pub-entry}
[ E. G. Herrer]{.pub-authors},  M. A. Herrada., A. M. Gañán-Calvo, P. S. Stewart. 
[**Stability of finite-length collapsible channel flow to spanwise perturbations**]{.pub-title}. 
[*Physic of Fluids*, 36, 124105 (2024).]{.pub-venue}  
[[PDF]](https://pubs.aip.org/aip/pof/article-pdf/doi/10.1063/5.0237604/20279061/124105_1_5.0237604.pdf) [[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0237604) 
:::

See all publications on the [Research](research.qmd) page.

-->
